creator: dfilter@FreeBSD.ORG
text:
edwin       2008-06-06 13:56:40 UTC

  FreeBSD ports repository

  Modified files:
    ports-mgmt/barry     Makefile 
    ports-mgmt/bpm       Makefile 
    ports-mgmt/kports    Makefile 
    ports-mgmt/port-maintenance-tools Makefile 
    ports-mgmt/portbrowser Makefile 
    ports-mgmt/portdowngrade Makefile 
    ports-mgmt/portless  Makefile 
    ports-mgmt/portscout Makefile 
    ports-mgmt/qtpkg     Makefile 
  Log:
  Bump portrevision due to upgrade of devel/gettext.
  
  The affected ports are the ones with gettext as a run-dependency
  according to ports/INDEX-7 (5007 of them) and the ones with USE_GETTEXT
  in Makefile (29 of them).
  
  PR:             ports/124340
  Submitted by:   edwin@
  Approved by:    portmgr (pav)
  
  Revision  Changes    Path
  1.25      +1 -1      ports/ports-mgmt/barry/Makefile
  1.20      +1 -1      ports/ports-mgmt/bpm/Makefile
  1.8       +1 -1      ports/ports-mgmt/kports/Makefile
  1.6       +1 -0      ports/ports-mgmt/port-maintenance-tools/Makefile
  1.11      +1 -1      ports/ports-mgmt/portbrowser/Makefile
  1.11      +1 -0      ports/ports-mgmt/portdowngrade/Makefile
  1.11      +1 -0      ports/ports-mgmt/portless/Makefile
  1.11      +1 -1      ports/ports-mgmt/portscout/Makefile
  1.10      +1 -1      ports/ports-mgmt/qtpkg/Makefile
